chunks: "Pastor’s coming at noon," Ethan blurts out, his face flushing crimson even as he stands his ground. "To check on us. You can’t... we can’t leave yet."  Vivian’s laugh is low, throaty, a sound that seems to vibrate in the marrow of Maya’s bones. She exchanges a glance with Julian, something private and electric passing between them. "We know," Vivian says, her eyes never leaving Maya’s face. "We watched him park at the Hendersons’ first. He’s chatting up the old lady about her hydrangeas. We have maybe twenty minutes."  Julian’s hand slides from Maya’s hip to her lower back, pressing her forward, into the house, into the dimness. "Show us where you sleep," he murmurs, his voice rough with a desire that sounds human and messy, not clinical. "We want to see the bed where you touched yourself while we watched from the street. We want to smell it."  They step inside, and Ethan closes the door, the lock clicking with a finality that makes Maya’s breath hitch. Vivian immediately sheds her coat, letting it pool on the floor like a puddle of expensive skin. Beneath, she wears only the camisole and nothing else, her own body mature, soft in the belly and hips, her pubic hair dark and neatly shaped, a triangle that makes Maya unconsciously touch her own sparse patch through her shorts. "Ethan," Vivian says, turning to him, her gaze raking down his pressed shirt to the obvious tent of his khakis. "You look good enough to ruin. Come here."  Ethan moves toward her as if pulled by a string, and Vivian meets him in the middle of the living room, her hand sliding up to cup his jaw, her thumb pressing into his mouth, parting his lips. "You’re shaking," she observes, her voice tender, almost maternal, but her other hand dropping to grip him through his pants, squeezing with a authority that makes Ethan’s knees buckle. "We’re not going to hurt you," she promises, though her smile suggests hurt is on the menu, just dressed up differently.

"We’re going to teach you how to film her properly. How to light her cunt so the camera weeps."  Julian has moved behind Maya, his hands on her shoulders, his erection pressed hard against the small of her back. He bends his head, his beard scratching her neck, his breath hot and wet in her ear. "The pastor," he reminds her, his voice a growl, one hand sliding down her stomach to cup her over her shorts, pressing his palm against her heat. "We need to hide, don’t we? Or do we stay and watch? Do we let him see us in your eyes while you lie to him?"  Maya’s vision swims. Julian’s fingers are circling her clit through the fabric, and she can see Vivian has unzipped Ethan’s pants, her hand working him slowly, the pomade-scented boy arching into her grip like a plant toward sun. "Upstairs," Maya gasps, her hips bucking against Julian’s hand. "My room. The closet. You can hear everything. You can... you can watch through the slats."
